name: Security groups allowing public SSH
query: { securityGroups(where: {rules_SOME: {direction: { eq: "Inbound" }, action: { eq: "Allow" }, AND: [{OR: [{sources_INCLUDES: "cidr:0.0.0.0/0"}, {sources_INCLUDES: "cidr:::/0"}, {sources_INCLUDES: "tag:Internet"}, {sources: { eq: [] }}]}, {OR: [{destFromPort_LTE: 22, destToPort_GTE: 22}]}]}}) {...AssetFragment}}
